CMakeFiles/blackbox.dir/client/genesis/stdafx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blackbox.dir/client/pch.cpp.o -o blackbox  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -lallegro_main -lallegro_acodec -lallegro_audio -lallegro_ttf -lallegro_font -lallegro_primitives -lallegro_image -lallegro_physfs -lallegro -lphysfs /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so
